name: Slab Serif Collection
classification_notes: The page is a category listing of slab serif typefaces from Brandon Nickerson's studio, including display-oriented slab designs such as BN Gummie, BN Zipline, BN Brick, BN Slabby Bold, BN Squire and BN Rockies.
summary: A category page listing six slab serif display typefaces from Brandon Nickerson's small independent studio, priced between $18 and $35 each.
description: Six slab serif typefaces from Brandon Nickerson's studio, ranging from BN Gummie and BN Slabby Bold through to BN Rockies and BN Zipline. The designs sit squarely in the casual display end of the market, aimed at graphic designers working on branding, apparel and social content. BN Squire is offered as a free download, with the remainder available for individual purchase or as part of bundled collections.
foundry_blurb: Brandon Nickerson offers a range of slab serif typefaces available individually or as part of heavily discounted bundle collections, all licensed for commercial and personal use on up to three computers.

name: Hand Drawn
classification_notes: The page presents a category of textured, hand-drawn typefaces spanning scripts, serifs, sans-serifs and display styles, all unified by their hand-crafted, rough aesthetic rather than any single formal classification.
summary: A category page of textured, hand-crafted typefaces from Brandon Nickerson's studio, covering scripts, serifs and sans-serifs with a rough, handmade quality.
description: The hand-drawn section of the BNicks shop collects 18 individual typefaces, all sharing a textured, informal character suited to casual branding, apparel and social graphics. Styles range from script faces like BN Pelican Script and BN Grainville Script through to sans-serifs like BN Hand Gothic and BN Cringe Sans, each carrying visible hand-crafted irregularity. Prices are low and several titles are on permanent sale, positioning the range as accessible material for independent designers and hobbyists.
foundry_blurb: Brandon Nickerson offers this collection of textured, hand-drawn fonts as part of a broader catalogue of affordable typefaces for creatives, with many titles available individually or bundled into discounted volume packages.

name: Sans Serif
classification_notes: This is a category listing page for Brandon Nickerson's sans-serif typeface collection, not a single typeface. Categorised as sans-serif/grotesque as the majority of named styles (Recon Grotesk, Axel Grotesk, Hillside Grotesk, Elephant Gothic, Nautic Grotesk) fall within that broad grotesque tradition.
summary: A broad shop category listing over 80 individual sans-serif typefaces from Brandon Nickerson's studio, ranging from display grotesques to hand-drawn styles.
description: This page collects the full range of Brandon Nickerson's sans-serif releases, a sprawling catalogue of individual typefaces priced between $7 and $199. Styles span conventional grotesques such as Recon Grotesk and Axel Grotesk through to decorative and display-oriented cuts. The catalogue is aimed at commercial designers looking for affordable, varied options for branding, editorial and digital work.
foundry_blurb: Brandon Nickerson offers a large and ever-growing catalogue of sans-serif typefaces for commercial and personal use, available individually or as part of bundled value packages. All fonts purchased through bnicks.com may be used commercially, on websites or apps, and on up to three personal computers.
